nodes.threat_name: 중거리 무선 통신을 통한 C2 (C2 via Mid Range Wireless Communication)

차량 내 원격 서비스의 악용 (Exploitation of Remote Services in In-Vehicle Network)

동적 주소 결정(동적 연결 설정) (Dynamic Resolution)
권한 제어 메커니즘 악용 (Abuse Elevation Control Mechanism)
동적 주소 결정(동적 연결 설정) (Dynamic Resolution)

in_phase_policy.note: Only threats with matching attack_vector are allowed as In.

dependency_policy.note: All mandatory dependency rules must be satisfied for each path; otherwise the path is filtered out.

out_phase_policy: Out phase is allowed only on the target asset in this search.
note: Local/Physical now includes In and searches In->Through->Out paths (no Entry). In-node asset must be boundary outside.

boundary_policy.note: For Local/Physical, In-node asset is restricted to boundary 'outside' side (treated as vehicle internal in this TM7).
